name: codex-coordinator
description: Keep several Codex tasks focused, visible, and inside clear boundaries.

interface.longDescription: Give Codex Coordinator one project goal. It reuses related tasks, gives each one a clear job, shows who is working on what, and warns when work may collide. It stays with the project you already have without an always-on manager, copied chat history, duplicate project setups, or a forced process.
defaultPrompt: Help my Codex tasks move in parallel with less duplicate work and fewer crossed edits
Show me who is working on what and flag work that may collide
Coordinate this goal across the right existing tasks and keep each task focused
